channel.title: Confidence Calculator auf Nicky Reinert
channel.description: Blog & projects by Nicky Reinert (Institute for Digital Challenges): web development & software development, SEO & analytics, hosting & DevOps, WordPress & Hugo, tools & projects, data protection & digital culture — plus content on AI and autism & society.

item.title: The Confidence Calculator - A/B Testing Made Easy
item.author: Nicky Reinert
item.description: A simple and easy-to-use confidence calculator for A/B testing. Calculate confidence levels, p-values, power and more for your A/B tests.
item.dc:subject: Lesezeit: 10 Minuten
